questionHtml: By deleting vertex A, use the deleted vertex algorithm to find a lower bound for the cost of the trip.
markschemeHtml:
finding weight of minimum spanning tree       M1

70 + 80 + 100 + 180 = (US$) 430        A1

adding in two edges of minimum weight        M1

430 + 90 + 150 = (US$) 670        A1
